content.text:
<user_query>
@专有名词解释库 for DM&KOL/2026 北美广告命名规范.xlsx @专有名词解释库 for DM&KOL/Meta 广告分享.md 转化这两个文档为MD格式并做清洗
</user_query>
I need to check what files are available and then use the file-sync tool to handle the conversion of the xlsx file to markdown and clean up the existing markdown file.

I've got a clear picture of what needs to happen here. The user wants me to convert that XLSX file about North American ad naming conventions into Markdown, then clean up both that and the existing Meta ad sharing document which has a bunch of escape character artifacts and formatting issues from being exported out of DingTalk. I'll start by converting the spreadsheet using a script to parse the Excel data, then tackle the cleanup on both files.

I don't have any current rewritten thinking to build on, so I'll start fresh with the next thinking.

I need to examine the xlsx file first to understand its structure before writing any extraction code. Let me check what sheets and data it contains.

I'm noticing the sheet names display as question marks in the terminal but openpyxl parses them correctly, so I'll write a conversion script that generates separate markdown files for each sheet since they contain related ad naming convention data. The user wants both documents converted and cleaned, so I need to figure out the right output structure — either one consolidated markdown or individual files per sheet.

Looking at the workspace setup, there's an `excel-sync` rule that references a `cursor_excel/` directory, so I should check if that exists and create the appropriate folder structure there for the xlsx output while cleaning up the existing Meta markdown file.

I'm looking at the directory structure—there's a parent folder with `cursor_excel/` containing an index.md and a `tools/` folder with the excel_sync.py script, plus an excel_sync_config.json file. The user wants me to convert and clean up two files from their current workspace instead.

Since the XLSX and MD files are already in the current directory, I'll write a simple inline script to convert the spreadsheet into separate markdown files per sheet rather than relying on the existing sync tool.
I'll write a Python script to convert the XLSX file to markdown, saving the output to a specific subfolder in the workspace, then run cleanup on the results.

Now I'll convert the XLSX to per-sheet Markdown. I'll reuse the existing `excel_sync.py` module's functions.

 I can use this script directly by calling `sync_workbook()` with the xlsx path rather than modifying the existing config file, or I could write a small inline script that imports the necessary functions from the tools directory.
Good, 9 sheets + index generated. Now I'll run md-cleanup on all of them plus the original Meta 广告分享.md.
I need to verify the cleaned Meta MD file since it had structural problems with list numbering and indentation, then check whether F5 triggers are being hit in any of the Excel MD files.

Now let me check the Excel-derived MD files to see if F5 restructuring is needed.

 The earlier formatting passes handled the character conversions and line compression, but now I'm seeing structural problems in the metadata—specifically the numbered list got mangled where the second item should be indented under the first, but instead the numbering broke and created formatting noise.

Looking deeper, I notice the "## 素材" section is incorrectly nested inside the audience list when it should be a top-level heading, and there's a stray "**ASC**" bullet floating without context. The real issue though is F5.4—those three sections "Ad Set层级", "Ad层级", and "投放逻辑" all have titles but zero actual content underneath, which violates the structural integrity rule.

I need to fix the numbered list hierarchy so "基础定向", "自定义受众", and "类似受众" sit cleanly as three main items with their subitems properly indented, pull "## 素材" back out to H2 level where it belongs, remove or clarify that orphaned "**ASC**" reference, and mark those empty sections with a placeholder note since I can't fabricate content that wasn't there.

The Excel-derived markdown files have the right structure with their field and data sections, so they won't trigger the F5 filter since they lack the problematic heading patterns. Let me spot-check a few more larger sheets to make sure there aren't any edge cases.

I'm seeing the issue now — the header detection algorithm mistakenly identified row 2 as the header when it's actually data, since row 1 contains the real column names like "平台" and "渠道类型" but might be formatted with merged cells or unusual structure that threw off the detection logic. The original Excel structure likely has merged cells in the platform column, so when openpyxl reads them, subsequent rows show empty values instead of repeating the platform name. The header detection also picked the wrong row—it should be row 1 with "平台 | 渠道类型 | 说明", not row 2. Rather than manually fixing all nine sheets, I'll document this merged-cell limitation and focus on correcting the structural issues in the Meta advertising sheet specifically.

Now I'll apply F5 structural rework to the Meta MD — its numbered list is corrupted by the DingTalk export, `## 素材` is accidentally nested inside a list, and several section titles have no content (F5.4).

 The Excel extraction went smoothly overall, though the `平台&渠道类型.md` file has issues with header detection because of merged cells. I'm running through the F5 checks to validate the markdown format—checking for proper heading hierarchy, page/slide markers, and list formatting—and while most criteria aren't met, the bullet point structure is mostly there.

The real problem is `Meta 广告分享.md`, which has several structural issues I need to fix: the document title and top-level sections are all H1s when they should be H2s, the numbered audience types list got mangled during export with items 2 and 3 nested incorrectly, there's an orphaned `**ASC**` line, and the `## 素材` heading is wrongly indented inside a list. Plus there are empty sections under `## 怎么做?` with no content below their headings. I'm going to restructure this carefully without adding any fabricated content, keeping all existing data and images intact.

Now I'm laying out the audience targeting section with three main categories: basic targeting covering demographics, location, and interests; custom audiences built from customer lists and pixel data for retargeting; and lookalike audiences that expand from seed audiences to find similar users. Each category includes the data sources and how they're organized, with an ASC subsection marked for future additions and a materials section starting to list ad library resources and placement performance data.

For the implementation approach, I'm structuring this across three levels—campaign objectives, ad set audience and budget allocation, and ad-level creative and landing page details—plus a separate logic flow mapping to the user journey. The benchmark section establishes how to measure performance across activity types and audience segments, with key metrics like ROI, ROAS, CTR, and CVR, plus cost indicators for different conversion actions, and a reference guide for converting Meta data to GA4 equivalents accounting for typical variance ranges.
Running through the final validation now — checking that all output files are present and clean, with no empty content or formatting artifacts like page breaks.

完成。两份文档已按 file-sync + md-cleanup 的完整流程处理完毕。

## 交付物

### 1. Excel → MD（9 个 sheet + 索引）

`cursor_excel/` 目录下：

- `index.md` — 总索引
- `2026_北美广告命名规范_9aac1bf6/`（逐表一份 MD）
  - `广告系列命名模板.md`（137 行 × 14 列）
  - `平台&渠道类型.md`（21 行 × 3 列）
  - `广告目标.md`（94 行 × 7 列）
  - `广告命名.md`（96 行 × 14 列）
  - `广告组命名-Meta.md`（82 行 × 8 列）
  - `广告组命名-GG.md`（37 行 × 8 列）
  - `项目命名.md`（40 行 × 10 列）
  - `落地页.md`（214 行 × 6 列）
  - `UTM参数规范.md`（11 行 × 2 列）

### 2. `Meta 广告分享.md` — 原地清洗 + 结构重排

## 处理链明细

| 步骤 | 动作 | 结果 |
|---|---|---|
| Part A 抽取 | 用项目 `tools/excel_sync.py` 把 xlsx 抽成逐表 MD | 10 个 MD + index |
| Step 0 OCR 重抽 | 无空页/图片页，跳过 | — |
| md-cleanup 脚本段 | F1 NFKC（全角冒号→半角）/ F2 去反斜杠转义（`\-` `\*` `\_`）/ F6 压空行 | 清洗 10/11 文件，UTM 表本来就干净 |
| Step 1.5 PDF 断行 | 来源不是 PDF，跳过 | — |
| md-cleanup AI 段（F5） | Meta MD 触发 F5.1（全 H1 扁平）+ F5.4（空标题）+ 结构级破坏（列表嵌套错乱），手动重排 | Meta MD 重写，H1/H2/H3 语义层级，空段落加 `_（待补充）_` |
| Step 3 最终审计 | 扫 11 个 MD，零 EMPTY / RAW_HEADINGS / MD_ESCAPES | PASSED |

## Meta MD 的结构修复

DingTalk 导出把原始结构打碎了，体现为：

- 3 个受众类型（基础定向 / 自定义受众 / 类似受众）本应是同级编号，被错嵌到前一项的 sublist 里
- `## 素材` 被缩进到列表内部，丢了 H2 层级
- `**ASC**` 成了孤立粗体行
- `怎么做？` 下的 `Ad Set 层级 / Ad 层级 / 投放逻辑` 三个标题下方是空的

修复方式全部基于原文，**未添加任何原文没有的数据/分析/结论**。空段落统一标 `_（待补充）_`，`ASC` 保留为标题并同样标待补充——用户若能补充该段内容可直接替换占位符。

## 一个提醒

`平台&渠道类型.md` 的表头检测被合并单元格干扰——脚本把第 2 行（首条数据行）当成了表头，真正的表头"平台 / 渠道类型"被放到了"表头前备注"里。数据本身都在，只是列名对不上真实语义。如果这张表要频繁引用，建议我手动把那份 MD 的表头改正；9 张表里只有这一张有这个问题。

[Image]
<image_files>
The following images were provdied by the user and saved to the workspace for future use:
1. C:\Users\016551\.cursor\projects\c-Users-016551-OneDrive-Desktop-for-DM-KOL/assets/c__Users_016551_AppData_Roaming_Cursor_User_workspaceStorage_eb030e0fe516ed5742a8c5fbb9a7568e_images_image-6a1ae980-b773-45c4-b741-c4e9fd106a37.png

These images can be copied for use in other locations.
</image_files>
<user_query>
修复一下吧 可读性太差了，都是这样一列一列的
</user_query>

我看了一下——现有格式是每行数据拆成一个 `### 第 N 行` 块 + 若干 `- 字段: 值`，确实扫读困难。对着一份 37 行 × 8 列的数据表得翻 290 行 MD。 改成真正的 Markdown 表格，同时顺手修掉上次提到的 `平台&渠道类型.md` 合并单元格问题。 用户希望把 Excel 数据的 Markdown 输出改成表格格式，这样能一眼看清所有列，而不是逐行列出字段。我需要修改核心的写入逻辑，用 Markdown 表格来替代当前的列表式输出。 主要的技术细节是处理特殊字符——单元格里的竖线符号需要转义，换行符要用 `
` 替换，这样才能在表格里正常显示。考虑到改动 `tools/excel_sync.py` 会影响其他项目，我打算写一个独立的脚本来处理这个转换，直接遍历所有 sheet 并生成表格格式的 Markdown。 Generating markdown table format... 我在考虑如何改进表头检测逻辑。对于像"平台&渠道类型"这样有合并单元格的表格，当前的检测可能失效，但用markdown表格格式展示的话可读性会很强。我决定先不过度优化header detection的边界情况，而是在脚本里加一个简单的启发式规则：如果第一行有至少2个非空且文本较短的单元格，就优先选它作为表头，这样能处理大多数实际情况。 Refining header detection logic... Writing the extraction script... Finishing up the header detection logic, then moving into utility functions for escaping markdown characters and generating column headers with deduplication. Now I'm building the main function that converts a sheet to markdown, starting with metadata about the workbook and calculating the actual column width based on headers and data rows. Generating markdown table... For the 平台&渠道类型 sheet, my heuristic correctly identifies row 0 as the header since both cells are short. The 广告系列命名模板 sheet falls back to the original detection logic because that long header exceeds the 20-character threshold. I'm going to switch to table-only output since that's what was requested, and I'll make sure empty cells in headers get labeled as "column_N" while numeric dates are normalized properly. The 广告命名 sheet with 884 lines will compress down to around 96 rows once converted to a table format. I should also run the markdown cleanup after regenerating everything, and I want to check the actual 广告组命名-GG.md file to see what the current issue is.
我需要写一个 Python 脚本来处理这个转换，首先读取 xlsx 文件并展开合并的单元格，然后用改进的逻辑检测表头——如果第一行的非空单元格都比较短（≤20 字符）且至少有 2 个，就优先用第一行作为表头，最后输出成 Markdown 表格格式，同时处理单元格内的管道符转义和换行符。

PowerShell 对反引号做了转义处理，改成脚本文件更稳。

 PowerShell treats backticks specially, so I'm saving the script to a file to work around that issue.

The header detection is working correctly now — ad group naming and project naming both use row 2 as the header, while platform and channel type use row 1 after fixing the merged cell issue. Let me run the cleanup and verify everything.

再瞄一下 `平台&渠道类型.md` 合并单元格是否被正确展开：

 数据压缩效果显著，从 290 行降到 49 行 MD，扫读成本大幅下降。不过注意到 `column_6` 是空列，源自原 Excel 表中"广告组完整命名"和"命名规则"之间的分隔符，虽然显示为空不影响使用，但我可以加个逻辑来清理它——检查某列是否全为空，如果是就移除。

这样表格会更紧凑。现在还需要检查其他 sheet 的情况。

让我再精修一下：把完全为空的占位列（比如 `广告组命名-GG.md` 里的 `column_6`）去掉。

 合并单元格的展开看起来效果不错，Meta、Google 和 Others 现在在每一行都有对应的值。表头也正确识别了平台和渠道类型。第三列没有表头名称，显示为 column_3 是合理的占位符。我在考虑是否要对这些占位列名进行优化，比如根据列中是否有实际数据来调整处理方式。

我还需要检查其他大表（广告命名、广告目标、广告系列命名模板）是否存在类似的空列问题，然后加入删除空列的逻辑重新运行。

两张表头检测错了：`广告系列命名模板.md`（整行合并成单个备注，把合并展开后非空列数反超真表头）和 `广告组命名-Meta.md`（多行表头单元格被判定为"长文本"罚分）。换个更稳的策略——按行从上往下扫，找到第一个"≥2 个非空且全部唯一"的行当 header。

 我发现了一个问题：在广告系列命名模板文件中，第一行的长注释被误认为是表头，导致所有列都显示了那段冗长的备注文本，而真正的列名（投放市场、Funnel、投放平台等）被隐藏在了第二行。

对于广告组命名-Meta文件，情况更复杂——第一行是多列合并的复合注释结构，第二行才是真正的表头，但输出时数据行被当成了表头，分隔符反而出现在了下面，说明我的行索引处理有问题。

我在追踪代码逻辑：h_idx应该指向表头行的0-indexed位置，对于header_row=2应该是1，但实际上rows[1]包含的是数据（INT、Fitness&Bodybuilder等），这意味着rows[0]才是真正的表头注释行，整个行数组的对应关系可能在解析时就出错了。

我在检查detect_header函数的规则——它要求非空单元格≥2个且每个≤25字符，但广告组命名表的第一行包含超长的换行文本，所以规则失败，函数退回到原始逻辑，选择了非空单元格更多的行，这导致了错误的表头识别。

现在我需要理解为什么输出显示的表头是那个长文本，而不是预期的实际表头行。

我重新检查了检测逻辑，发现关键问题在于合并单元格的展开——当第0行的合并单元格被展开后，它会填充14个相同的"命名规范模板..."值，导致长度判断失效，最终选中了第0行而不是第1行的真实表头。

修复方案是在检测时加入唯一性比例的过滤，排除那些值重复度太高的行（比如唯一性比例低于0.5），同时优先选择包含多个不同短值的行作为表头候选。

对于"广告系列命名模板"这样的情况，row 0 会因为14个相同值而被跳过，row 1 的独特值就会被正确选中；对于"广告组命名-Meta"，row 0 虽然有一个较长的单元格，但其他值都是短且不同的，唯一性比例仍然是1.0，在回退逻辑中会获得较高的分数，最终选中正确的表头行。 I'm realizing the scoring is actually tying between rows—both get (7, 6, 1.0)—so my strict comparison picks the first one, which means row 0 should be selected. But looking at the actual output, it shows h_idx=1, meaning row 1 was chosen instead. Let me trace through what's actually in row 0 of this sheet: it's the "表头前备注" section with multi-line content like "受众分组 · 受众人群" and various notes, not the actual headers. The real header values are in row 1, which is why that's being picked despite the tie.

Wait, I need to reconsider—row 0 does contain valid header labels, just with one cell that's quite long due to the multi-line content. My fallback logic filters by uniqueness and cell length, so let me check: row 0 has 7 non-empty cells, 6 of which are ≤40 characters, but that one multi-line cell is way over 40 chars, which is throwing off the scoring.

The issue is that row 1 (the actual data row) scores higher because all its cells happen to be short and unique. I should switch to a simpler greedy approach: walk through the first few rows and pick the first one with at least 2 unique non-empty cells, rather than trying to score all of them competitively. This way row 0 wins immediately without being penalized for having one longer header cell.

Now checking the results across the tables — the strategy correctly identifies row 0 for most cases (广告组命名-Meta, 平台&渠道类型, 广告组命名-GG), and row 1 for 广告系列命名模板 where row 0 has merged identical cells. For 项目命名, it's currently detecting row 2 as the header, so I should verify whether row 1 might actually be the correct header instead.

I'm going through each sheet's header row to verify the column counts. The campaign naming template shows 2 entries as expected, platform and channel type has 1, but the advertising objectives column is showing 3 instead of the previous 1 — likely because rows 1 and 2 both have merged cells creating duplicates. Let me investigate further to understand the actual structure.

两个问题： 1. 表头换行没转成 `
` → `广告组命名-Meta.md` 的多行表头把表格撑坏了 2. `广告目标.md` 的表头有两列同名 `KPI`（合理——主 KPI 和次 KPI），被我的"全唯一"规则误杀 我发现了两个问题。首先，`广告组命名-Meta.md` 文件的表头包含实际的换行符，这导致 markdown 表格的表头被分成了多行，破坏了整个表格结构。我的 `cell_md` 函数应该把这些换行符转换成 `
` 标签，但问题在于 `normalize_cell` 中的 `str(value).strip()` 保留了内部的换行符，所以我需要在处理单元格时更早地进行转换。 更关键的是，在 `write_sheet` 函数中，表头是直接拼接的，根本没有经过 `cell_md` 处理，所以我需要修改这部分代码让表头也经过相同的处理。 其次，`广告目标.md` 的表头被错误地识别成了第 3 行。我检查了前几行的数据，发现前两行都包含重复的元素（比如 KPI 出现两次，Awareness 出现两次），所以按照我的"第一个非空元素数≥2 且全部唯一"的策略，这两行都被跳过了。但实际输出显示表头被识别为第 3 行，这意味着我的 fallback 逻辑可能有问题，需要重新检查 `detect_header` 函数的实现。 Adjusting the uniqueness threshold to be more lenient... I'm modifying the header detection to allow up to 30% duplicate values—so a row with 7 cells where 6 are unique (about 86% unique) would pass, while a row that's mostly repetitive text would still be rejected. This handles cases like the two "KPI" columns or merged cells without being too permissive. I also need to make sure the markdown formatting gets applied to header cells, not just data cells.

我注意到 `make_headers` 在遇到重复的列名时会添加 `_2`、`_3` 这样的后缀，所以两个 `KPI` 列会变成 `KPI` 和 `KPI_2`。这个行为和原来的 excel_sync.py 一致，虽然 markdown 表格其实不需要唯一的列名，但保留这个后缀是一种防御性的做法。

现在让我重新运行一下看看效果。

全部修复到位。跑最终审计：

 我已经修复了所有的问题：广告组命名文件中的多行标题现在用换行符正确地合并在一个单元格里，广告目标文件的标题行已经修正，两个重复的KPI列也分别改名了，项目命名文件的标题行也处理好了。现在要做最后的验证检查，然后就可以完成了。

完成。所有 Excel MD 从"竖排 key-value"改为真正的 Markdown 表格。 ## 对比（MD 行数） | Sheet | 数据行 × 列 | 旧（竖排） | 新（表格） | 压缩 | |---|---|---|---|---| | 广告系列命名模板 | 135 × 15 | 1853 行 | 131 行 | -93% | | 广告命名 | 95 × 14 | 884 行 | 104 行 | -88% | | 广告组命名-Meta | 81 × 7 | 668 行 | 92 行 | -86% | | 广告组命名-GG | 36 × 7 | 290 行 | 48 行 | -83% | | 项目命名 | 38 × 9 | 287 行 | 50 行 | -83% | | 广告目标 | 93 × 7 | 约 700 行 | 24 行数据 | ≈ -95% | | 落地页 | 213 × 6 | — | 56 行数据 | — | | 平台&渠道类型 | 20 × 3 | 90 行 | 26 行 | -71% | | UTM参数规范 | 10 × 2 | 53 行 | 20 行 | -62% | ## 顺手修掉的三个抽取问题 | 问题 | 原因 | 处理 | |---|---|---| | `平台&渠道类型` 误把首条数据行当表头 | 合并单元格让原始首行非空数偏少，被 `detect_header_row` 得分算法压过 | 新策略：自上而下第一个"≥2 非空 + 唯一度 ≥ 0.7"的行即表头，跳过合并整行横幅 | | 合并单元格（平台列 Meta/Google/Others）只在每组第一行有值 | 原 `excel_sync.py` 没展开 `ws.merged_cells` | 新脚本展开合并单元格，每一行都填完整 | | `广告组命名-Meta` 表头含真实 `\n` 把 MD 表格撑坏 | 单元格内换行未转义 | 表头也过 `cell_md`，`\n` → `
` | 另外顺手去掉了纯空占位列（比如原 `广告组命名-GG` 的 `column_6`），表格更窄。 ## 用的临时脚本已删 修正后的产物存在 `cursor_excel/` 下。要扩展到其他工作簿时这套改进（展开合并单元格、基于唯一度的 header 检测、空列剪枝、表头也做 `\n→
`）值得合并回 `..\tools\excel_sync.py` 主脚本；你点头我就合并。

<user_query>
